title: Tipperary
short_description: Android AR experience exploring 1940s Lochee, Dundee — the Tipperary neighbourhood between Marshal Street and Athol Street.
description: Get the sense of what it was like to live, work and socialise in 1941 in an area of Dundee known locally as Tipperary. Tipperary was a collection of approximately 20 houses in the area of Lochee between Marshal Street and Athol Street.

news.title: Dundee augmented reality game allows users to explore 1940s Lochee
